panels.description: Cerca e seleziona una sessione notturna per data o ora. Tutti i pannelli vengono aggiornati sulla sessione scelta.
Tempo rilevato in posizione supina nella sessione selezionata.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "confidence" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.position == "supine" and r.session_id == "${session_id}") |> group(columns: ["session_id"]) |> elapsed(unit: 1ms) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.elapsed >= 0 and r.elapsed <= 10000) |> group(columns: []) |> sum(column: "elapsed") |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: r.elapsed) / 1000.0}))

panels.title: Tempo supino

panels.description: Tempo rilevato in posizione prona nella sessione selezionata.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "confidence" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.position == "prone" and r.session_id == "${session_id}") |> group(columns: ["session_id"]) |> elapsed(unit: 1ms) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.elapsed >= 0 and r.elapsed <= 10000) |> group(columns: []) |> sum(column: "elapsed") |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: r.elapsed) / 1000.0}))

panels.title: Tempo prono

panels.description: Tempo rilevato sul fianco destro nella sessione selezionata.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "confidence" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.position == "right_side" and r.session_id == "${session_id}") |> group(columns: ["session_id"]) |> elapsed(unit: 1ms) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.elapsed >= 0 and r.elapsed <= 10000) |> group(columns: []) |> sum(column: "elapsed") |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: r.elapsed) / 1000.0}))

panels.title: Tempo lato destro

panels.description: Tempo rilevato sul fianco sinistro nella sessione selezionata.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "confidence" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.position == "left_side" and r.session_id == "${session_id}") |> group(columns: ["session_id"]) |> elapsed(unit: 1ms) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.elapsed >= 0 and r.elapsed <= 10000) |> group(columns: []) |> sum(column: "elapsed") |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: r.elapsed) / 1000.0}))

panels.title: Tempo lato sinistro

panels.description: Percentuale del tempo classificato trascorsa in ciascuna posizione nella sessione selezionata.

targets.query:
import "array"
d = from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "confidence" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.session_id == "${session_id}") |> group(columns: ["position"]) |> elapsed(unit: 1ms) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.elapsed >= 0 and r.elapsed <= 10000) |> group(columns: ["position"]) |> sum(column: "elapsed")
get = (position) => union(tables: [array.from(rows: [{_value: 0.0}]), d |> filter(fn: (r) => r.position == position) |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: float(v: r.elapsed)}))]) |> group() |> sum(column: "_value") |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)
s = get(position: "supine")
p = get(position: "prone")
r = get(position: "right_side")
l = get(position: "left_side")
t = s._value + p._value + r._value + l._value
array.from(rows: [{Nome: "Posizioni", Supino: if t > 0.0 then s._value / t * 100.0 else 0.0, Prono: if t > 0.0 then p._value / t * 100.0 else 0.0, "Decubito destro": if t > 0.0 then r._value / t * 100.0 else 0.0, "Decubito sinistro": if t > 0.0 then l._value / t * 100.0 else 0.0}])

panels.title: Percentuale del tempo per posizione

panels.description: Tempo della sessione non classificato con sufficiente certezza.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "confidence" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.position == "unknown" and r.session_id == "${session_id}") |> group(columns: ["session_id"]) |> elapsed(unit: 1ms) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.elapsed >= 0 and r.elapsed <= 10000) |> group(columns: []) |> sum(column: "elapsed") |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: r.elapsed) / 1000.0}))

panels.title: Tempo in transizione

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "posture", tag: "patient_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position", start: 0)
list.label: Paziente monitorato
list.name: patient_id
